---
title: "contribution-lisa"
author: "Lisa"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Project Proposal

Added key statistics section:

- looked at missing values

- looked at sample sizes for different age groups and gender

- looked at Unsicherheit

Furthermore:

- Analysis plan for first research question

## Data cleaning

- checked content of Region_ID and then converted to numeric

- create start and end date columns

- convert doubles to integers

- add unique row identifier

## Analysis of first research question

- Analysis question according to research plan

- Create visualisations in lisa-results.qmd

## Workflow

- Specified workflow in previous project proposal

- Set up Github

- Reviewed Leo's pull requests

- Contributed to group reflection
